title: Prabhat's Full Grass+
description: Full Grass Looks Better Download Now!
body: # IMPORTANT **While Applying This Resource Pack You may See A Warning So Ignore It** # FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS Q: How do I install the pack? A: Follow this guide. Q: Can you port this to Bedrock? A: I currently have no plans to port this to Bedrock. Q: Can someone else port this to Bedrock? A: No, I do not allow third-party ports of my packs. Q: Can you add this feature? A: Maybe! Comment any suggestions and we can see what happens. Q: I found a bug! A: Comment all bugs and I will fix them as soon as possible. Q: Does this pack work on X version? A: The pack is confirmed to work as far as 1.15. It is unlikely to work on any earlier version due to changes to filenames. Q: Can I add this to my modpack? A: Of course! You must give credit and can not claim any of my work as your own.
